properties.title: Mesoscale Structure Experiment
properties.description:
This experiment links the Mesoscale Structure workflow and the EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition products. This workflow contains the code used to build and analyze datasets for a research study on stratocumulus mesoscale organization, with a focus on closed and open cell structures and their transitions.

The workflow is split into five main stages: (1) Find EarthCARE orbits that are relevant for the study and prepare EarthCARE ACM-CAP data, (2) fine-tune and apply the "judge" CNN to MSI and fine-tune the "judge" CNN to GOES, (3) run trajectory calculations and apply the CNN along trajectories on GOES imagery, (4) create datasets combining ACM-CAP data with CNN labels along EarthCARE tracks and along trajectories, and (5) perform final science analysis.

The EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition Dataset includes related data products and model artifacts describing mesoscale cloud structure, microphysics, precipitation, and cloud evolution: (1) manually labelled EarthCARE/MSI and GOES/ABI image datasets for cloud-structure classification, (2) fine-tuned CNN model weights for MSI and GOES classification, (3) an EarthCARE stratocumulus scene catalogue linking cloud organization with active/passive microphysical and precipitation retrievals, and (4) GOES and ERA5-trajectory-based datasets identifying and characterizing closed-to-open-cell transitions.

links.title: EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition Dataset
